title: zhaoanthus henryi
intro: Zhaoanthus henryi is a plant species, also known as the golden thread or golden corydalis, which belongs to the Corydalis genus. Traditionally, it is used in herbal medicine, particularly in Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM), to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties. Zhaoanthus henryi is valued for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as pain relief, improved circulation, and reduced inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and processed into capsules, tablets, or teas to maximize its medicinal effects.
